review_title: Hands Down - Best in the Business
description: Really, I have not experienced anything in the online world where this amount of care has gone into a product. It has helped me get my business out to the public. Thanks, Cass and Jen!
author: Alex F.
pros: The incredible amount of care added every step of the way. Other businesses request a fee for every little add-on - with DCH so much is included. The course templates, automation, emails, funnels, SEO, site templates, legendary support, FB group and more.
cons: So far, I have had no big issues. The small ones, such as trying to find a button, are answered quickly in the FB group or with support.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I coach in -person, online, have evergreen courses, virtual workshops, teach continuing education to massage therapists and have a busy practice seeing clients one-on-one so I have unique needs. Luckily, Digital Course Hive is also unique in what they offer! Not just features just to say they have them...but carefully, well thought out features that make sense for the user. Easy to navigate. Easy to implement. Easy to customize. Easy to love!
author: Shandra A.
pros: I have used about 3 different platforms to try and bring all that I do into one framework. This software allows me to do more while working less on actually implementing it. It's so intuitively easy, has so much of what I was piecing together before...and they continue to add new functionality and improve an already incredible software. I love the how-to videos and [SENSITIVE CONTENT] are right there when you need them. I am so happy with the website builder, the pre-built funnels, the sales page templates and customization available for their pre-built templates.
cons: For me the calendar feature could have more features such as text reminders, client uploads/attached documents before I would consider switching. I am also looking forward to a course building template that outlines what you need to actually create a multi-tiered course because that really help me not get overwhelmed. Neither of those minor inconveniences are enough to sway me. This software has saved me 100s of hours and lots of $$!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall it's been really good. It's clean, I love the templates and it does almost everything I need it to, it's a one stop shop kind of deal
author: Kelly R.
pros: The software is fairly easy to use and reasonably priced, but [SENSITIVE CONTENT] are always there to help out.
cons: There are a couple of buggy type things where there might be a disconnect, but that could also be my misunderstanding of something.

review_title: DCH changed how I run my business
description: My experience with DCH has been phenomenal. Having everything housed in one platform has streamlined so much of my administration work. And the response time from support makes it clear they’re concerned about customer use.
author: Cyndi M.
pros: Once your site is set, it’s easy to update & add into your site. Customer service is incredibly informative and quick to respond. They will create customized videos to help you get your answer. Everything is incredibly customizable. Importing information is incredibly easy. The store function is easy. Creating new pages and funnels is also easy. With the internal software I was able to let go of three other services I was using that are all now housed in DCH.
cons: Within the scheduling software, it be really helpful to have a reschedule function. Currently clients have to cancel an appointment and rebook completely. Some aspects of the software are not intuitive, but, again, customer service is very quick to help what may not be intuitive.

review_title: Game changer for the edupreneur industry
author: Cassia W.
pros: This product is easy to use, extremely affordable, and has all the features I need to run my education business. My favorite features are A/B split testing, the visual email automations, and the ease of designing both the website and my products.
cons: The onboarding process could be simplified, and the themes could be more impressive.

description: Jennifer and Cassia are beautiful top-notch women. Brains, skills and talents with their personality has benefited me in my business. Always ready to knock any problems or aid in showing me what to do. Love this DCH....
author: Terrell S.
pros: Love this software since it's all in one! Email, website, appointments, courses, digital and physical products.
cons: Haven't use the Blog feature. I wish more training on this area on how to. Also will love more templates. Able to integrate my Groupleads to facebook driectly without using Zapier
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It's REALLY worth the price to have web, course, membership, email, and more all wrapped in one!!
author: Amanda S.
pros: The fact that there's so many different benefits of this platform! all in one
cons: There was a huge learning curve on the course building and website side of things coming from Squarespace !
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Made the switch and don't regret it
author: Melissa M.
pros: Super easy to use and it is a 'one stop shop'. Everything ties together neatly and new features and templates being added all the time.
cons: I'd love to use the calendar booking function but reminder emails which include the date and time of the calls are not yet possible. This function and more is available elsewhere and is the only software platform I have retained other than Digital Course Hive. I'd also like more tutorials.

review_title: Digital Course Hive is the future of digital courses!
description: I have nothing but great things to say about DCH, such a good bang for your buck!
author: Dana B.
pros: I was able to recreate my Wordpress site on DCH very easily! There are so many features included, I’m beyond obsessed!
cons: I had a small issue with the email marketing platform early on but Jen and Cass jumped in and fixed the issue for me.

description: The team at DCH are quick, responsive and super helpful.
author: Cat P.
pros: This platform is absolutely amazing! It's encompasses everything we need for our own business and have moved our client offering to the same platform too. A CRM with funnels all in the same digital space as your website makes it so functional. It's easy to use too.
cons: Downloadable reports would be great and looking forward to when the affiliate stuff is rolled out.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: There are some features I am waiting on to roll out but overall the product is pretty user friendly.
author: Jillian M.
pros: The customer service is unmatched. Amazing support from the gals who built the platform.
cons: I can't schedule a time for emails to go out
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great software and highly effective! I highly recommend it!
description: My business is in the beginning stages of growth and thus far I've been able to get things set up for the exponential growth and production I'm in expectancy to receive.
author: Leteisha T.
pros: I love that this software is very flexible with unlimited creative control for design outlook. It's creation for easy navigation for your business needs is pretty amazing. You get a lot of amazing features and all inclusive tasks that make this platform very cost effective and highly recommendable. The [SENSITIVE CONTENT] of this software are amazing, professional, warm, kind, and attentive to their customers to satisfy us and our business needs with excellence as well as setup the platform for optimal and profitable performance.
cons: I'm not major tech savvy to have any cons at this time and it is one of best platforms that I've learned to navigate with less frustration and with more peace. So perhaps as my business begins to grow I will have more to measure this standard by.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Customer service is great, website it great
author: Katie M.
pros: [SENSITIVE CONTENT] helped with integration therefore it was easy.
cons: Some things confuse me on building but I believe thats more user error than anything else.

review_title: New to DCH, but very impressed.
author: Rachel R.
pros: Completely customizeable with great templates and videos in the platform to teach me how to use it-- way better than alternatives. Love that I can add all my branding and it replaces so many different platforms: Thinkific, Convert Kit, Calendly and more!
cons: The migration took longer than anticipated and communication about delays wasn't the very best. Still totally worth it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: The all-in-one is brilliant and cost effective for a start up
author: Hazel R.
pros: It's very user friendly and you have access to quick and sometimes instant tech assistance. It over delivers as an all-in-one option I think I need to build the best online platform for my business. I have just scratched the surface of what it can do at the basic level. I'm excited to get to the upgraded version.
cons: I don't know what I don't know yet. So far so good.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Customer service is amazing! The produce is amazing! The price is amazing! You really can't go wrong!
author: Jamie K.
pros: The platform is definitely user friendly and is expanding and developing all the time! They listen to their customers and try to make their platform better based on our needs and wants. This has truly been a blessing!
cons: I know they are working on it, but right now, I need a community feature for my membership.
author_profession: Life Coach for Christian Teen Girls
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Amazing platform with top notch support!
author: Alabama L.
pros: It has everything! I mean EVERYTHING you need to run a business online. From your website, funnels and calendar to the back end things like company training and courses.
cons: Nothing. There isn't anything not to like.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Nikko C.
pros: The Drag and Drop feature is really helpful for the users. If you are still learning on how to build websites this app is the best.
cons: Maybe more YouTube tutorials but overall it is an amazing app.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
